address.address1: Jl. Keuchik Amin, Beurawe, Kec. Kuta Alam

nearbyPlaces.name: Dr drg SUZANNA S Sp Kga
Ikatan Dokter Indonesia Cabang Banda Aceh

usefulInfo.name: License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-4 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 5 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The price is worth it, but the cleanliness in the around (hallways, reception area, and courtyard) is lacking. The room is okay and comfortable, but there are no soap and water facilities, as well as towels.
comments.originalComment: Harga Worth it, cuma kebersihan sekitar (lorong², ruang resepsionis dan halaman kurang bersih). Kamar oke dan nyaman, Cuma tidak ada fasilitas sabun dan air, serta handuk.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Fasilitas kurang memuaskan
Bed terlalu kecil untuk 2 orang
Kalau ada kendala pelayanan nya agak kudang memuaskan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel party claims to not cooperate with Agoda. The order has already been successfully completed. Don't book this hotel.
comments.reviewTitle: The hotel refused to check in from Agoda.
comments.originalTitle: Hotel menolak cek in dari agoda
comments.originalComment: Pihak hotel beralasan Tidak bekerja sama dengan agoda.  Pada pesanan sudah sukses. Tidak usah book hotel ini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We are guests from Surabaya. We arrived in Aceh at night with 3 toddlers. When we checked in, the door was not opened for us, and we waited for 1 hour without any response. Eventually, we stayed at the nearest mosque. The next day we returned to request a refund because we didn't use the facilities. But the hotel management refused. We are very disappointed. This is truly irresponsible. Hopefully, this does not happen to other tourists.
comments.originalComment: Kami tamu jauh dr surabaya. Sampai ke aceh malam dengan membawa 3 balita. Ketika kami check in tidak dibukakan pintu, 1 jam kami tunggu tak kunjung dibuka. Akhirnya kami menginap di masjid terdekat. Besoknya kami kembali untuk meminta refund dana karena kami tidak menggunakan fasilitas. Tp pihak hotel menolak. Kami sangat kecewa.  Sunguh tidak bertanggung jawab.  Semoga tidak terjadi pada wisatawan lain

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Dengan harga murah menurutku penginapan ini sudah sangat cocok
